input.headline: What the experts want you to know about these key ADHD symptoms

raw.headline: What the experts want you to know about these key ADHD symptoms

winner: A squirrel just confessed to me that he's been diagnosed with Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). He can't seem to stay focused on burying his acorns, always forgetting where he hid them, and he's constantly darting about the park, never staying still for long. Who knew that even nature's tiniest troublemakers could have ADHD too?

candidates.text: A patient asked the doctor, "Doc, I've been diagnosed with ADHD, but I don't remember a single symptom they mentioned!" The doctor replied, "Well, that's one of them right there!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to the topic. It cleverly ties the forgetfulness mentioned in the joke back to ADHD symptoms, creating a self-referential humor that aligns well with the headline."}

candidates.text: A squirrel just confessed to me that he's been diagnosed with Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). He can't seem to stay focused on burying his acorns, always forgetting where he hid them, and he's constantly darting about the park, never staying still for long. candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative and specific analogy with a squirrel, surprising twist, concise and natural humor that ties into the topic"}

candidates.text: Here's a deadpan understatement joke based on the given news headline: "Experts assure everyone with ADHD that they will indeed find those keys when they eventually notice their hands are holding them.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to ADHD symptoms with a clever twist on forgetfulness. It uses natural English and delivers a subtle, deadpan humor that aligns well with the headline."}

candidates.text: Why can't people with ADHD ever play hide and seek? Because they always give away the secret location... their attention deficit!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to ADHD symptoms but lacks specificity and the punchline feels a bit forced. The humor is mild and not particularly surprising or clever."}

candidates.text: A doctor walks into a bar and orders a drink, suddenly he forgets what he's there for. The bartender looks at him quizzically and says "I didn't know ADHD was contagious!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and ties into the topic of ADHD, but it's a bit generic and relies on a tired setup (doctor in a bar). The humor is mild and not particularly specific to the headline's context."}
